code:
export const DEFAULT_PAGES = [{
  id: 1,
  type: "cover",
  title: "A Word of Thanks to the Nation's by the School Principal",
  subtitle: "A Story for Little Explorers",

    overlayCircles: true,

  }
}, {
  id: 2,
  type: "content",
  title: "A Word of Thanks to the Nation's by the Academic Advisor",
  text: "Deep inside a sparkling forest, a tiny rabbit named Luna discovered something truly wonderful — a glowing golden acorn that hummed like a song.",

  textColor: "#000000",

  image: "Images/ThankWordTwo.png",

    cardRadius: 20,
    cardBorder: "1px solid rgba(165,214,167,0.6)",
    overlayCircles: true,
    contentOrder: ["title", "image"]
  }
}, {
  id: 3,
  type: "content",
  title: "The Wise Old Owl",
  text: "Luna ran to find her friend Oliver the Owl, who lived in the tallest oak tree. 'What does it mean?' she asked, holding up the shiny acorn.",
  bg: "linear-gradient(135deg, #e3f2fd, #bbdefb)",
  textColor: "#161616",
  fontSize: 18,
  image: "Images/ThankWordThree.png",

    gap: 0,

    cardBg: "rgba(255,255,255,0.35)",
    cardRadius: 14,
    cardBorder: "1px solid rgba(144,202,249,0.5)",
    factsBg: "rgba(227,242,253,0.55)",
    factsRadius: 12,
    factsBorder: "1px solid rgba(144,202,249,0.4)",
    overlayCircles: false,
    contentOrder: ["image"]
  }
}, {
  id: 4,

    facts: ["We extend our deepest gratitude, recognition, and profound appreciation for your monumental efforts and continuous sacrifices to protect our community and safeguard our nation.", "In every field and challenging situation, you have proven to be the protective shield and faithful support of the UAE, placing human safety and public health above all else.", "Your limitless giving and sleepless nights to ensure our nation enjoys peace and safety embody the highest values of loyalty and dedication rooted in the legacy of Zayed.", "Thanks to your devotion, the UAE remains an inspiring oasis of safety for the entire world. May God protect you and protect our leadership and people.", "You will always remain the pride and treasure of this land of glory and leadership."],
    author: "— Alia Mohammed"

sourcesContent:
export const DEFAULT_PAGES = [
  {
    id: 1,
    type: "cover",
    title: "A Word of Thanks to the Nation's by the School Principal",
    subtitle: "A Story for Little Explorers",
    bg: "linear-gradient(135deg, #deddda, #ffffff)",
    textColor: "#000000",
    fontSize: 26,
    image: "Images/ThankWordOne.png",
    style: {
      fontFamily: "'Bubblegum Sans', cursive",
      titleAlign: "center",
      textAlign: "center",
      imageW: "100%",
      imageH: "80%",
      imageFit: "contains",
      imagePosition: "center",
      imageShadow: "0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.25)",
      imageRadius: 5,
      imageBorder: "4px solid #3c3c3c",
      gap: 10,
      padding: [24, 22],
      overlayCircles: true,
      contentOrder: ["title","image" ],
    },
  },

  {
    id: 2,
    type: "content",
    title: "A Word of Thanks to the Nation's by the Academic Advisor",
    text: "Deep inside a sparkling forest, a tiny rabbit named Luna discovered something truly wonderful — a glowing golden acorn that hummed like a song.",
    bg: "linear-gradient(135deg, #deddda, #ffffff)",
    textColor: "#000000",
    fontSize: 26,
    image: "Images/ThankWordTwo.png",
    style: {
      fontFamily: "'Nunito', sans-serif",
      titleFontFamily: "'Bubblegum Sans', cursive",
      titleAlign: "center",
      textAlign: "center",
      imageW: "100%",
      imageH: "80%",
      imageFit: "contains",
      imagePosition: "center",
      imageRadius: 10,
      imageBorder: "4px solid #3c3c3c",
      imageShadow: "0 4px 16px rgba(46,125,50,0.3)",
      gap: 12,
      padding: [22, 20],
      cardBg: "rgba(255,255,255,0.40)",
      cardRadius: 20,
      cardBorder: "1px solid rgba(165,214,167,0.6)",
      overlayCircles: true,
      contentOrder: [ "title", "image"],
    },
  },

  {
    id: 3,
    type: "content",
    title: "The Wise Old Owl",
    text: "Luna ran to find her friend Oliver the Owl, who lived in the tallest oak tree. 'What does it mean?' she asked, holding up the shiny acorn.",
    bg: "linear-gradient(135deg, #e3f2fd, #bbdefb)",
    textColor: "#161616",
    fontSize: 18,
    image: "Images/ThankWordThree.png",
    titleSize: 26,
    style: {
      fontFamily: "'Quicksand', sans-serif",
      titleFontFamily: "'Bubblegum Sans', cursive",
      titleAlign: "left",
      textAlign: "left",
      imageW: "100%",
      imageH: "100%",
      imageFit: "contains",
      imagePosition: "center",
      imageRadius: 0,
      imageShadow: "0 6px 20px rgb(0, 0, 0)",
      gap: 0,
      padding: [0, 0],
      cardBg: "rgba(255,255,255,0.35)",
      cardRadius: 14,
      cardBorder: "1px solid rgba(144,202,249,0.5)",
      factsBg: "rgba(227,242,253,0.55)",
      factsRadius: 12,
      factsBorder: "1px solid rgba(144,202,249,0.4)",
      overlayCircles: false,
      contentOrder: ["image"],
    },
  },

  {
    id: 4,
    type: "content",
    title: "The Map Appears!",
    text: "Oliver smiled wisely. 'That acorn is a key!' Suddenly a magical map unfolded from inside the acorn — showing a path to the Rainbow Waterfall.",
    bg: "linear-gradient(135deg, #fce4ec, #f8bbd0)",
    textColor: "#880e4f",
    fontSize: 18,
    image: "Images/soilders.png",
    titleSize: 26,
    style: {
      fontFamily: "'Courgette', cursive",
      titleFontFamily: "'Bubblegum Sans', cursive",
      titleAlign: "center",
      textAlign: "center",
      imageW: "98%",
      imageH: "30%",
      imageFit: "contains",
      imagePosition: "center",
      imageRadius: 8,
      imageBorder: "4px solid #971753e6",
      imageShadow: "0 6px 24px rgba(136,14,79,0.22)",
      gap: 12,
      padding: [22, 20],
      cardBg: "rgba(255,255,255,0.32)",
      cardRadius: 22,
      cardBorder: "1px solid rgba(244,143,177,0.5)",
      factsBg: "rgba(252,228,236,0.55)",
      factsRadius: 16,
      overlayCircles: true,
      contentOrder: [ "facts", "image" ],


      factsFontSize: 11,
      factsColor: "#971753e6",
      factsFontWeight: 300,
      factsFontStyle: "normal",
      factsLineHeight: 1.3,
      factsTextAlign: "left",

      factsAuthorFontFamily: "'Bubblegum Sans', cursive",
      factsAuthorFontSize: 13,
      factsAuthorColor: "#b91c51",
      factsAuthorFontWeight: 700,
      factsAuthorFontStyle: "italic",
      factsAuthorAlign: "right",
    },
    reference: {
      facts: [
        "We extend our deepest gratitude, recognition, and profound appreciation for your monumental efforts and continuous sacrifices to protect our community and safeguard our nation.",
        "In every field and challenging situation, you have proven to be the protective shield and faithful support of the UAE, placing human safety and public health above all else.",
        "Your limitless giving and sleepless nights to ensure our nation enjoys peace and safety embody the highest values of loyalty and dedication rooted in the legacy of Zayed.",
        "Thanks to your devotion, the UAE remains an inspiring oasis of safety for the entire world. May God protect you and protect our leadership and people.",
        "You will always remain the pride and treasure of this land of glory and leadership.",
      ],
      author: "— Alia Mohammed",
    },
  },

  {
    id: 5,
    type: "content",
    title: "The Journey Begins",
    text: "Luna and Oliver packed a tiny backpack with berries and honey. Together they hopped and flew through the shimmering trees, following the golden path.",
    bg: "linear-gradient(135deg, #fff8e1, #ffecb3)",
    textColor: "#e65100",
    fontSize: 18,
    image: "Images/ThankWordFour.png",
    titleSize: 26,
    style: {
      fontFamily: "'Pacifico', cursive",
      titleFontFamily: "'Bubblegum Sans', cursive",
      textFontFamily: "'Nunito', sans-serif",
      titleAlign: "center",
      textAlign: "center",
     imageW: "98%",
      imageH: "80%",
      imageFit: "contains",
      imagePosition: "center",
      imageBorder: "4px solid rgba(254, 254, 254, 0.7)",
      imageShadow: "0 8px 20px rgba(230,81,0,0.20)",
      imageRadius:10 , 
      gap: 12,
      padding: [22, 20],
